title: Enhanced Creative/Spectator Mode
description: A Quality of life Mod for a better Creative and Spectator experience!
body:
This Mod makes your Life in Creativemode and Spectatormode waaaaaaaaaay easier. Everytime your in Creative or Spectator you get an Item and a Command to toggle 'Godmode', u get Speed, Invisibility and Night Vison. The Item/Command isnt useable in Survival (As far as I can test).
Feel free to leave any suggestions for me.
